rationale: Iran peace deal signals are the most impactful story for a US resident — potential end to a US-involved conflict with oil market and geopolitical implications; Musk's SpaceX milestone is a notable market event.

top_events.title: Iran war live: US and Tehran signal peace deal within reach
top_events.summary: A US-Iran peace deal would end direct US military involvement, potentially lower oil prices, and reshape Middle East policy — a significant development for American daily life and markets.

top_events.title: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX soars in stock market debut
top_events.summary: SpaceX's stock market debut drives Musk to trillionaire status — a notable US financial market event with broad investor interest but limited direct impact on most Americans.

top_events.title: China arrests US academic for espionage
top_events.summary: China detaining a US academic signals continued bilateral friction, raising concerns about Americans traveling to or working in China.
